\tzpentry{ID5535}{Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5535 introduces Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{\phi}_i = \Omega_i + \sum_{j\neq i} K^{(O)}_{ij} \sin(\phi_j - \phi_i) + \Lambda_i, \end{equation}
